sentences.arabic: كَانَ الشُّعَرَاءُ العَرَبُ يَكْتُبُونَ قَصَائِدَ طَوِيلَةً فِي القَدِيمِ.
sentences.translation: Arapski pjesnici su u davna vremena pisali duge kaside.
sentences.translationEn: Ancient Arabic poets wrote long poems.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتْ هَذِهِ القَصَائِدُ تَتَحَدَّثُ عَنِ الصَّحْرَاءِ وَالخُيُولِ وَالشَّجَاعَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ove pjesme su govorile o pustinji, konjima i hrabrosti.
sentences.translationEn: These poems spoke about the desert, horses, and courage.

sentences.arabic: يَعْتَبِرُ العَرَبُ الشِّعْرَ دِيوَانَهُمْ، أَيْ أَنَّهُ يَحْفَظُ تَارِيخَهُمْ.
sentences.translation: Arapi smatraju poeziju svojim registrom, što znači da ona čuva njihovu historiju.
sentences.translationEn: Arabs consider poetry their 'diwan,' meaning it preserves their history.

sentences.arabic: حَتَّى اليَوْمِ، يَقْرَأُ الطُّلَّابُ هَذِهِ الأَبْيَاتِ الجَمِيلَةَ فِي المَدَارِسِ.
sentences.translation: Čak i danas, učenici čitaju ove lijepe stihove u školama.
sentences.translationEn: Even today, students read these beautiful verses in schools.

sentences.arabic: يُسَاعِدُ الشِّعْرُ النَّاسَ عَلَى فَهْمِ مَشَاعِرِهِمْ بِشَكْلٍ أَفْضَلَ.
sentences.translation: Poezija pomaže ljudima da bolje razumiju svoja osjećanja.
sentences.translationEn: Poetry helps people understand their feelings better.
